case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. ANGELA A VUONG et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP 585] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VUONG, ANGELA A $2,116.49 PRINCIPAL, $282.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,398.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
